questions.question_text_full:
Select the most appropriate indirect form of the given sentence.
Rani said to me, “A monkey bit me in the park.”

options.text: Rani asked me if a monkey bit me in the park.
Rani told me that a monkey bit me in the park.
Rani told me that a monkey had bitten her in the park.
Rani told me that a monkey has bitten her in the park.

questions.correct_option_text: Rani told me that a monkey had bitten her in the park.

questions.question_text_full:
Select the correct passive form of the given sentence.
Her failure to get admission in the Science stream surprised us.

options.text: We are surprised about her failure to get admission in the Science stream.
We were surprised about her failure to get admission in the Science stream.
We had been surprised about her failure to get admission in the Science stream.
We have been surprised about her failure to get admission in the Science stream.

questions.correct_option_text: We were surprised about her failure to get admission in the Science stream.
